name: Apotek K-24
notes: Largest 24-hour pharmacy chain in Indonesia. Stocks common Rx and OTC. For compounding (e.g., LDN), they refer to partner pharmacies.

name: Kimia Farma
national_coverage: all major cities including Aceh, Padang, Pekanbaru, Banjarmasin, Pontianak, Manado, Jayapura
notes: State-owned (BUMN). National network. Some branches are 24-hour. Compounding capable at major branches — call ahead for LDN, midodrine, fludrocortisone.

name: Guardian
notes: Mall-based health & beauty + pharmacy. Carries OTC, vitamins, common Rx. Limited compounding.

name: Watsons
notes: Mall-based pharmacy + drugstore. Similar to Guardian. Carries OTC + common Rx.

name: Century Healthcare
notes: Jabodetabek-area chain. Many 24-hour locations. Strong on imported vitamins/supplements.

name: Apotek Roxy
notes: Jabodetabek-area. Some branches inside Roxy supermarkets. Stocks OTC + Rx.

name: Viva Health
notes: East Java + Bali + NTB regional. Many 24-hour locations. Strong vitamins/supplements.

name: BPJS-partner apotek
national_coverage: nationwide; check your BPJS card for assigned apotek
notes: For BPJS-covered prescriptions. Generic substitutions standard. Compounding rare under BPJS — discuss with treating doctor for off-label needs like LDN.

name: RS-pharmacy (hospital pharmacy)
national_coverage: any major hospital including RSCM, RS Hasan Sadikin, RSUD Dr Soetomo, RS Sardjito
notes: Hospital pharmacies. Often the only path for limited-availability drugs (e.g., midodrine, fludrocortisone). Requires prescription from the same hospital's physician typically.

name: Apotek Wellings
notes: Smaller Jabodetabek chain. Some branches compounding-capable. Call ahead for LDN or similar.
